description: Style NoteThe adidas Phaedra derives it's name from Greek mythology and the word means 'bright'. Now that's something that this shoe definitely brings to the table. Wear this for a quick workout session, a weekend catch-up at a cafe or a coffee date - you're guaranteed to look good.Product DetailsSilver mesh upper with synthetic overlays with a round toed styleadiPrene midsole in whiteadiWear outsole with grooves at the periphery, horizontal grooves and a decoupled heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a clean clothDo not machine wash or store under sunlight
